phrases.context: Universal Islamic greeting used in all formal and informal situations; the standard way to greet any Muslim
phrases.contextBs: Univerzalni islamski pozdrav koji se koristi u svim situacijama, formalnim i neformalnim

phrases.bs: I na vas mir, Allahova milost i Njegovi blagoslovi
phrases.en: And upon you peace, the mercy of Allah and His blessings
phrases.context: The full, most respectful response to السلام عليكم; preferred in formal settings
phrases.contextBs: Najpotpuniji i najuvaženiji odgovor na selam; preferira se u formalnim situacijama

phrases.context: Warm, friendly greeting used when welcoming someone to a place or into a conversation
phrases.contextBs: Topao, prijateljski pozdrav koji se koristi pri dočeku nekoga na nekom mjestu

phrases.en: Welcome (you are among family and ease)
phrases.context: Warm welcome expression, often used when receiving a guest into your home or office
phrases.contextBs: Topao izraz dobrodošlice, često se koristi pri primanju gosta u dom ili ured

phrases.context: Formal greeting directed at a group, such as at the opening of a meeting or conference
phrases.contextBs: Formalni pozdrav upućen grupi, npr. na početku sastanka ili konferencije

phrases.context: Standard informal inquiry about someone's wellbeing, used with peers and friends
phrases.contextBs: Standardno neformalno pitanje o nečijem stanju, koristi se s vršnjacima i prijateljima

phrases.context: Polite and formal way to ask about someone's wellbeing, used with elders, officials, or superiors
phrases.contextBs: Uljudan i formalan način da se pita o nečijem stanju; koristi se sa starijima, zvaničnicima ili nadređenima

phrases.context: Morning greeting used from dawn until around noon in both formal and informal contexts
phrases.contextBs: Jutarnji pozdrav koji se koristi od zore do otprilike podne, u formalnim i neformalnim kontekstima

phrases.en: Morning of light (response to good morning)
phrases.context: The standard warm response to صباح الخير; completes the greeting exchange politely
phrases.contextBs: Standardni topli odgovor na صباح الخير; lijepo zaokružuje razmjenu pozdrava

phrases.context: Evening greeting used from around noon onwards, in formal and informal settings alike
phrases.contextBs: Večernji pozdrav koji se koristi od podne nadalje, u formalnim i neformalnim situacijama

phrases.en: Evening of light (response to good evening)
phrases.context: The standard warm response to مساء الخير; expected in polite conversation
phrases.contextBs: Standardni topli odgovor na مساء الخير; očekuje se u pristojnoj konverzaciji

phrases.context: The most common farewell in MSA; said by the person staying to the one who is leaving
phrases.contextBs: Najčešći oproštaj u MSA; kaže ga onaj ko ostaje onome ko odlazi

phrases.context: A sincere and warm farewell, often used when parting for a longer period or wishing someone a safe journey
phrases.contextBs: Iskren i topao oproštaj, često se koristi pri rastanku na duže vrijeme ili pri željama za siguran put

phrases.context: A neutral farewell equivalent to 'goodbye', used in both spoken and written contexts
phrases.contextBs: Neutralan oproštaj ekvivalentan 'doviđenja', koristi se u govorenom i pisanom obliku

phrases.context: Used to greet someone who has returned after an absence, whether short or long
phrases.contextBs: Koristi se za dočekivanje nekoga ko se vratio nakon odsutnosti, kratke ili duge

phrases.bs: Drago nam je što ste se vratili
phrases.en: We are glad for your return
phrases.context: Formal, warm expression welcoming someone back, used in professional or official contexts
phrases.contextBs: Formalan, topao izraz dobrodošlice nekome ko se vratio, koristi se u profesionalnim ili službenim kontekstima
